results.description: CONTRACTOR SHALL PERFORM MAINTENANCE AND REPAIRS TO ENGINES AND TRANSMISSIONS TO USACE'S FLOATING DOCKS LOCATED WITHIN 100 MILES OF THE NEW ORLEANS AREA. AUTHORIZED CALLERS WILL BE APPOINTED.
FLOATING DOCK ENGINE AND TRANSMISSION MAINTENANCE AND REPAIR: MODIFICATION TO CLARIFY GPC TERMS AND REVISE SUBMISSION OF PRICE CATALOGUE TO REFLECT SUBMISSION OF MFG. INVOICE WITH PAYMENT REQUEST.
